translations.en: Mondain
translations.zh: 蒙丹
translations.note: NPC name，邪惡三位一體之一，操控之體現

translations.en: a stone statue of the evil wizard Mondain.
translations.zh: 邪惡術士蒙丹的石像。

translations.en: "For what dost thou return, Avatar?"
translations.zh: 「聖者，汝為何再度歸來？」

translations.en: You remember as if it were yesterday how you defeated Mondain in your first visit to Brittania.
translations.zh: 你記憶猶新，第一次造訪不列顛尼亞時，你是如何擊敗蒙丹的。

translations.en: Using the four stones, you went back in time to smash his power-gem.
translations.zh: 你藉助四塊寶石，回溯時間，擊碎了他的力量寶石。

translations.en: The statue speaks!
translations.zh: 石像開口了！

translations.en: "We meet again, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「我們再度相遇，聖者。」

translations.en: "Fear not! I have but one @task now, and am no threat."
translations.zh: 「無需畏懼！我如今只有一個@task使命，不再構成威脅。」

translations.en: "Surely you of all people would recognize me as Mondain."
translations.zh: 「你更勝旁人，理當認得我是蒙丹。」

translations.en: "The gargoyles have enshrined my spirit here as the embodiment of @control."
translations.zh: 「魔像將吾之靈魂奉祀於此，作為@control操控之體現。」

translations.en: "I was once a mighty wizard."
translations.zh: 「吾昔日乃一代強大術士。」

translations.en: "Control was the essence of my soul--control of self and control of others."
translations.zh: 「操控乃吾靈魂之本質——自我操控，與對他人的操控。」

translations.en: "But desire for more control overcame me."
translations.zh: 「然而對更多操控的渴求最終壓倒了我。」

translations.en: "I forsook my self-control in my hunger for conquest."
translations.zh: 「吾在征服的渴望中拋棄了自我操控。」

translations.en: "Control must start with the self and expand outward."
translations.zh: 「操控必須從自身出發，方能向外擴展。」

translations.en: "The strong must lead. But to be strong one must control oneself first."
translations.zh: 「強者必須引領他人。然而要成為強者，必先自我克制。」

translations.en: "The gargoyles understand control."
translations.zh: 「魔像深諳操控之道。」

translations.en: "Their society is based on the strong guiding the weak."
translations.zh: 「其社會以強者引導弱者為基礎。」

translations.en: "In this way, they survive in their harsh world."
translations.zh: 「如此，他們在嚴酷的世界中求存。」

translations.en: "I have no concern for matters such as $Z."
translations.zh: 「$Z之事，吾不關心。」

translations.en: "I am enshrined here in eternal contemplation of the principle of @control."
translations.zh: 「吾永恆地奉祀於此，沉思@control操控之原則。」

translations.en: "I have no concern for matters such as $Z."
translations.zh: 「$Z之事，吾不關心。」

translations.en: "Contemplate what thou hast learned. Repeat after me the Mantra of Control."
translations.zh: 「默想汝所習得之事。隨吾覆誦操控真言。」
Un……

translations.en: "I can teach thee no more."
translations.zh: 「吾已無更多可教。」

translations.en: "Thy understanding is flawed. But I can teach thee no more."
translations.zh: 「汝之理解有所缺失。然吾已無更多可教。」

translations.en: "Farewell, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「別了，聖者。」

translations.en: "May thy @control help you succeed in thy quest."
translations.zh: 「願汝之@control操控助汝在使命中取得成功。」

translations.en: "Thou wilt need control of others to succede in thy quest, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「汝的使命需要對他人的操控，聖者。」
translations.note: 原文 succede 拼字錯誤，照原文翻

translations.en: "But thou wilt most of all need control of thyself to be worthy."
translations.zh: 「但最緊要之處，汝需自我克制方能稱得上聖者之名。」

translations.en: "$0 @control."
translations.zh: 「$0@control操控。」
translations.note: 語境評語的後半，與下方旁白合

translations.en: Thy deeds show a lack of
translations.zh: 汝之行為顯示缺乏

translations.en: Thy deeds show a need for more
translations.zh: 汝之行為顯示需要更多

translations.en: Thy deeds show understanding of
translations.zh: 汝之行為顯示對……的理解

translations.en: I admire thy deeds and thy
translations.zh: 吾欽佩汝之行為與汝之

translator_notes: 蒙丹是U1反派，在魔像神殿中以操控原則之體現的身份存在。四字一組的箴言式表述採文言，彰顯其超脫人世的神格。真言「Un」保留英文（gargoyle 語言原字）。評語旁白為四段漸進評分（差/中/良/優）。
